regulations.title: Cyber Security (Risk Assessment and Audit) Regulations 2024
regulations.subject: Establishes requirements for periodic cyber security risk assessments and audits of national critical information infrastructure entities

regulations.title: Cyber Security (Notification of Cyber Security Incident) Regulations 2024
regulations.subject: Prescribes incident notification procedures, timelines, and required information for national critical information infrastructure entities

regulations.title: Cyber Security (Licensing of Cyber Security Service Providers) Regulations 2024
regulations.subject: Prescribes licensing requirements, procedures, conditions, and fees for providers of cyber security services

regulations.title: Cyber Security (Compounding of Offences) Regulations 2024
regulations.subject: Specifies compoundable offences, compound amount calculation methodology, and procedures for compounding offences under the Act
